title: oldenlandia argillacea
intro: Oldenlandia argillacea, also known as "earth gentian" or "bitter sweet", is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia argillacea include the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential role in reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, Oldenlandia argillacea is often used in tea or capsule form, as well as being made into a decoction with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
